case_name: Moti Ram vs State of Madhya Pradesh
summary: Reaffirmed Section 436A mandatory bail rights; established that detention logs must be maintained
key_holding: Once an accused completes half the maximum sentence in detention, courts MUST grant bail. No discretion available to deny.
impact: Strengthened prisoners' rights; made courts accountable
full_text: The court emphasized that Section 436A is not discretionary. Once the period is completed, bail becomes an absolute right.
